text:
Hi, here is an updated version port for the new release of GNS3.
I've send a full 'shar' file, because don't know if I need to send only a diff or a full 'shar'.

I've add the condition ".if !defined(NO_INSTALL_MANPAGES)" on the Makefile too.

Regards,

Olivier
